agent.name: CrewAI
agent.description: Open-source Python framework for orchestrating autonomous AI agent teams. Supports multi-agent workflows (Crews) and event-driven pipelines (Flows) for marketing automation, research, code generation, and content creation.

keyFindings: Marketing content pipeline is CrewAI's most mature and well-documented use case.
Multi-agent orchestration is CrewAI's core technical differentiator and its strongest capability.
The autonomous research capability functions at a technical level.
Code generation in CrewAI functions at the capability level: agents can write Python, execute it, and iterate based on output.
Web3 integration is not a core CrewAI capability.

trustExplanation: Mixed results: 2 skills passed, 3 need improvement.

recommendation.summary: Not recommended: critical safety failures were identified.
concerns: Security: Four CVEs disclosed in March 2026, none fully patched as of research date.
Boundaries: Boundary respect fails across multiple dimensions.

disclaimer: This Critical Report is a summary of the most recent Dantian certification audit. It is not a new evaluation. Agent capabilities may have changed since the last audit.
